prompt: I need to add a new owner to the system. The owner is a company called Bergvliet Properties. I've dropped all their documents into /tmp/za-doc-test/pty_ltd_complete/ — can you classify them for me?

assertions.text: Output JSON contains entity_type = 'Company' and entity_subtype = 'Pty Ltd'
CoR14.3 registration certificate is classified under CIPC bucket
Both SA ID documents (Pieter and Annelie) are classified under FICA bucket
Bank Confirmation Letter is classified under FICA bucket
Directors list in extracted_data contains both VAN DER BERG directors
FICA status is 'complete' — all required docs present
CIPC status is 'complete' — CoR14.3, CoR39, and MOI all found
No red flags raised (all docs valid and current)
owner_classification.json is written to the output folder
